name: Boss is mad I filed after machine accident, scared of retaliation?

mainEntity.name: Boss is mad I filed after machine accident, scared of retaliation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Protected by law; tell lawyer or labor dept.
acceptedAnswer.description: Illegal under Utah/Idaho law; report to labor board or attorney.[3] Firing for claim violates anti-retaliation rules.[1] Key factors: Document threats; secure job protection. Workers comp shields you. Lawyer sends cease letter.

description: Protected by law; tell lawyer or labor dept.
